description: Benchmark baseline for Ranvier Core CI regression testing (§15 intelligence layer + partial tokenization)

test_config.environment: docker-compose.test.yml (mock backends, §15 features enabled, CI mode)

notes: Baseline captured from CI environment (100 users, 0.1-0.5s wait, ubuntu-latest runner)
All §15 intelligence layer features enabled + partial tokenization for routing
Partial tokenization delta vs 2.0.0: P99 85ms -> 59ms (-30%), throughput 502->513 rps (+2%)
Intelligence layer Prometheus counters read zero on mock backends (expected)
P99 latency target: <65ms for CI (10% regression budget over 59ms)
Update baseline via: gh workflow run benchmark.yml -f update_baseline=true
